title: Structural Causality Foundations
exclude_keywords: counterfactual explanation in graph neural networks

candidate_queries.query: (ti:"structural causal" OR abs:"structural causal" OR ti:"structural equation model" OR abs:"structural equation model") AND (cat:stat.ML OR cat:cs.AI OR cat:cs.LG OR cat:math.ST)
(ti:identifiability OR abs:identifiability OR ti:"do-calculus" OR abs:"do-calculus" OR ti:counterfactual OR abs:counterfactual) AND (cat:stat.ML OR cat:cs.AI OR cat:math.ST)

precision_queries.query: (ti:"potential outcomes" OR abs:"potential outcomes") AND (abs:causal OR abs:counterfactual)
